NOTICE OF MOTION TO FILE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOLMO, BESS-CAROLINA HEARING SET FOR JUN-23-2009 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

DISCOVERY 612, PLAINTIFF BESS-CAROLINA DOLMO'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANTS TO RESPOND TO INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT'S OBJECTIONS ARE OVERRULED AND ORDERED STRICKEN. AS THE RESPONSES HAVE NOT BEEN VERIFIED, THEY ARE NOT RESPONSES AS REQUIRED BY THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE. THE COURT WILL NOT DETERMINE THE ADEQUACY OF THE SUPPLEMENTAL RESPONSES ON THIS MOTION. FURTHER RESPONSES AND/OR VERIFICATIONS SHALL BE MADE WITHIN 10 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. ALL REQUESTS FOR SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE POS

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jul-10-2009 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-23-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF BESS-CAROLINA DOLMO'S Motion To File First Amended Complaint IS GRANTED ON THE CONDITION THAT PLAINTIFF STIPULATE EITHER TO SHORTEN TIME TO BRING A DISPOSITIVE MOTION ON THE NEW CLAIMS OR TO A REASONABLE TRIAL CONTINUANCE TO PERMIT SUCH A MOTION. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 = (301/PJB)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defts To Respond To Interrogatories And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-04-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff Bess-Carolina Dolmo's Motion To Compel Defendants To Respond To Interrogatories is granted. Defendant's objections are overruled and ordered stricken. As the responses have not been verified, they are not responses as required by the Code Of Civil Procedure. The court will not determine the adequacy of the supplemental responses on this motion. Further responses and/or verifications shall be made within 10 days of notice of this order. All requests for sanctions are denied. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-09-2009 Set For Trial On Aug-17-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jul-31-09 At 02:30 P.M. In Dept 220
